abstract: PHASESoundEvent  resume(at:) Instance Methodresume(at:)iOS 26.0+iPadOS 26.0+Mac Catalyst 26.0+macOS 26.0+tvOS 26.0+visionOS 26.0+func resume(at time: AVAudioTime?) Parameters timeThe desired start time based on the engine time retrieved from [PHASEEngine lastRenderTime]
overview:
PHASESoundEvent  resume(at:) Instance Methodresume(at:)iOS 26.0+iPadOS 26.0+Mac Catalyst 26.0+macOS 26.0+tvOS 26.0+visionOS 26.0+func resume(at time: AVAudioTime?) Parameters timeThe desired start time based on the engine time retrieved from [PHASEEngine lastRenderTime]

Resume the sound event at a specific time

A nil time parameter will resume immediately. The device time is not scaled by UnitsPerSecond and is in seconds.

Instance Method# resume(at:)

iOS 26.0+iPadOS 26.0+Mac Catalyst 26.0+macOS 26.0+tvOS 26.0+visionOS 26.0+

```
func resume(at time: AVAudioTime?)
```

## [ Parameters ](/documentation/PHASE/PHASESoundEvent/resume(at:)#parameters)

`time`The desired start time based on the engine time retrieved from [PHASEEngine lastRenderTime]

## [Discussion](/documentation/PHASE/PHASESoundEvent/resume(at:)#discussion)

Resume the sound event at a specific time

A nil time parameter will resume immediately. The device time is not scaled by UnitsPerSecond and is in seconds.
